A sibling tells friends embarrassing stories about me on purpose.
Family members imitate how I talk and everyone laughs.

My brother tells me no one else likes me and laughs.
Children in the park tell me to go home and that I do not belong.
Kids in my lane hide my bicycle and laugh when I look for it.
Neighbors' kids shout mean things at me from their balcony.
Children on my street tell others not to play with me.
Someone writes mean words about me in chalk near our house.

Kids dare me to run across a busy road for fun.

Sometimes my classmates joke about me and then say they are only kidding.

Sometimes group chats get mean but then people send nice messages after.
My friends copy how I talk in a funny way, and I am not sure how to feel.

What should I do if my friends joke about someone in front of me?
Kids in my class whisper about me and laugh whenever I walk past.
